nodes.name: oauth-force-refresh
nodes.title: Oauth Force Refresh

nodes.id: systemd OnCalendar = local time, не UTC

nodes.title: Systemd Oncalendar = Local Time, Не Utc

nodes.name: tg-persistent-keyboard
nodes.title: Tg Persistent Keyboard
